text:
Thank you for reaching out to Meridian Home Services!

Unfortunately, I wasn't able to process your HVAC tune-up booking request at this time — no changes have been made to your account.

I'd love to help get this sorted for you! Here are a few ways we can assist:

- **Try again** with any adjustments to your requested date or time
- **Contact our team directly** so a representative can look into this further for you

Is there anything else I can help you with, or would you like to explore alternative options?
